cards.rules_text: Flying
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“Peer beyond the clouds.”
— Chihacuan saying, meaning
“stay safe”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flying
Glumvale Raven gets +1/+0 as long as you control another creature with flying.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Ravens are too small to fight without help, and far too smart to try.[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Rotten Carcass dies, create a 2/2 colorless Construct artifact creature token.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“Poor thing. Devoid of thought, with a sole remaining use—this term's class project.”
—Jiu Mao, Senior Professor of Robotics/Life Sciences[/i]

cards.rules_text: Sacrifice a creature: Intli Assaulter gets +2/+2 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The front line attempted to scatter before the charging lizard barreled through them. The lizard did not wait.[/i]

cards.rules_text: [i]Ferocious[/i] – At the beginning of each combat, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, Impressible Cub gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Like mother, like cub.[/i]
[i]The swine roam the cliffs of the Intep, providing intrepid explorers with yet another reason to hunt for a path around the mountains to the oasis.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Trample
cards.flavor_text: [i]He lives under one infallible oath—keep others safe, no matter where or how.[/i]

cards.rules_text: War-Clan Dowager gets +1/+1 as long as you control another Centaur.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Jorah is Good, but our people must always come first. Let us pray we never have to make the choice.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: Prowess [i](Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]When Shigurei's powers were stripped from him, they radiated throughout the waters, saturating even the most mindless of its denizens.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, Blistering Lunatic gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“The scars and boils are harrowing, true, but that face will haunt my nightmares.”
—Jules Galway, First Legionnaire[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Dutiful Camel enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“Laugh at Akilu if you want. He is my my ally, and he makes me a better man.”
—Prince Quraish[/i]

cards.rules_text: Vigilance
cards.flavor_text: [i]No matter how big the enemy, no matter how great the war, he holds the line.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Chivalry 2 [i](At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may have target creature with less base power than this get +2/+2 until end of turn. If you do, this creature can't attack this turn.)[/i]
Soulsmoke Adept gets +1/+0 and has lifelink as long as it's embattled. [i](A creature is embattled if it has a counter on it or has a permanent you control attached to it.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]“The last breaths of the dead linger here, waiting to coalesce into ghouls—but I can make much better use of them.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Lake Cave Lurker dies, create a Treasure token.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“You say ‘treasure lost to the sea.' Perhaps, more aptly put, it is treasure gained by the sea.”
—Captain Lanne[/i]
cards.notes:
GW:
 - Odd MVs
 - +1/+1 counters
RG:
 - two of each land type
 - wayfarer 5c
GU:
 - five or more alternate costs
 - fathom
BG:
 - mana value 3 or greater
 - graveyard (lands)

cards.rules_text: Rakkiri Archer gets +0/+1 and has reach as long as it's embattled. [i](A creature is embattled if it has a counter on it or has a permanent you control attached to it.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]“I'll just nick its wing a little. That'll stop it from rampaging about like that.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Scry 1. [i](Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]Jorah's word is profound and brilliant.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Scry 2.
Hoard. [i](Create a Treasure token. If you control at least two Treasures, you may draw a card instead.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]To a gnome, gold is merely a material. The real treasure is knowledge.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. That creature gains haste until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]When the knights of the Blessed Army ride, they ride as one.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Until end of turn, target creature gains lifelink and “When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control.”
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Our victory matters little. The true prize in this war is their loss.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: Draw two cards.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The shamans of Val believe that they key to unlocking life's puzzles lie not only within them but within everything surrounding them as well.[/i]

cards.rules_text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Exotic Game Hunter.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The rarer the beast, the finer the trophy.[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Cankerous Hog dies, target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Its eyes have fallen out, its tusks are ingrown, and its skin is peeling off — but its legs are intact, so it continues to shamble.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flying
When Shrieking Pusbag enters the battlefield, sacrifice it unless you sacrifice another creature.
cards.flavor_text: [i]There are no friendly faces in the Silt Basin, just the bad and the worse.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
As an additional cost to cast Executioner's Madness, sacrifice a creature.
Target creature you control gets +5/+3 and gains trample until end of turn.
Prowess [i](Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]Formed from sand and forged by rain, the Xali have adapted to survive in both extremes.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, Dynamic Wyvern gains flying until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“It doesn't need empowerment. It needs encouragement.”
— Xiusheng[/i]

cards.rules_text: Adaptive [i](Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets only this creature, copy it.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]Ghariv's hunters know there is one golden rule of bear hunting—you only get one shot.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a noncreature card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“See the bubbles, Chian? Seems as if it's going to rain.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Vigilance
When Envoy of the Pure enters the battlefield, other creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn.
Whenever Centaur Wayfinder attacks, up to two target Centaurs you control each get +1/+1 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“We ride at dawn.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: Other Centaurs you control get +1/+1.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“The band I fight with makes nary a difference. Our aim is unified—purge the unworthy.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target Centaur you control.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The Blessed Army is trained by the most revered generals the land has to offer.[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Stratus Traveler enters the battlefield, traverse Cirrusea. [i](Planeswalk to Cirrusea. If you're already there, cause {A}.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]He always goes above and beyond.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flying
Whenever Alluring Wisps attacks, target creature defending player controls gets -2/-0 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“Beware the wisps on the cliff's edge. They will lull you into complacency, then simply watch as you make the fatal mistake.”
—Fae Queen Kikiro[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flying
When Rapacious Sprite enters the battlefield, hoard. [i](Create a Treasure token. If you control at least two Treasures, you may draw a card instead.)[/i]
Distribute two +1/+1 counters among one or two target creatures.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“I knew the day would come we were called to war, but I would have never guessed we'd be fighting the dead.”
—Remley Craggald of the East Ward[/i]

cards.rules_text: [i]Ferocious[/i] – Whenever a creature with power 4 or greater you control enters, Mieng, Who Dances With Dragons becomes a 4/4 Dragon creature with flying until end of turn.

Menace
Whenever a creature you control with power 4 or greater attacks, it gains menace until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“Such fearsome ferocity. I'm relieved to no longer have to match his blade.”
—Seto San[/i]

cards.rules_text: Whenever Cabracan's Familiar becomes blocked by a creature, it deals 2 damage to that creature.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Its claws will shred you into a bloody pulp — if the fire doesn't kill you first.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Target creature gets +4/+2 and gains trample until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“Imagine the greatest tree you've ever seen falling directly onto you. It's like that, but with more intention.”
—Captain Darlene Filham[/i]

cards.rules_text: Moonlight Stag has vigilance as long as it has a +1/+1 counter on it.
cards.flavor_text: [i]While most of Lijing's vessels are foxes, many other species have pledged their dedication to the Divine Realm.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Flying, vigilance
cards.flavor_text: [i]Even in Al Tabaq's most remote dunes, something is always watching.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Reach
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“I hear tales of worlds where spiders are no bigger than your fingernail. I hope to visit one someday.”
— Chiu's apprentice[/i]

cards.rules_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Nothing inspires an army quite like a hero's anthem.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. You gain 1 life for each creature you control.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“The dinner was spectacular. The ale, outstanding. I simply can't wait to see what's for dessert!”[/i]

cards.rules_text: Whenever another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Devil's Child.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Yessssss,” she hissed. “Bleed for me.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Haste
When Razorback Trenchrunner dies, put a 3/3 red Boar creature token onto the battlefield. It fights target creature an opponent controls.
When Sporegraft Slime dies, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Contrary to expectation, the gas it expels has myriad restorative properties.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Pungent Beetle enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each creature you controlled that died this turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]It gets its namesake odor from its cuisine of choice—anything rotting.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Menace
Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Covetous Wechuge.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]Hear the dulcet melody
Of horrors in the night?
The drip of blood, the crunch of bones
And now we've lost the light
—Rhygarde lullaby[/i]

Flying
Prowess [i](Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]Its claws are webbed and its wings are finned, allowing it to swim for extended periods after diving to catch fish.[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]Helicos storms bring out the oddest of its already curious fauna.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Discontented with its normal prey, the mutant lizard has resorted to consuming the plane itself.[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Dewdrop Oracle enters the battlefield, reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put a noncreature card from among them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

[i]“There are still worthy citizens of Ghariv trapped in the outer lands. We are here to bring them home.”
—Annadre Devell[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Warband Rallier enters the battlefield, put two +1/+1 counters on target Centaur you control.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The deep bellow of his horn can be heard by all centaurs across the plane.[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Cybres-Band Recruiter enters the battlefield, create a 2/2 green and white Centaur Knight creature token with vigilance.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Join us, comrade. You need not be holy to fight for what's right.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: Whenever another Centaur enters the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on Cybres-Clan Squire.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“My elders have known the way for eras. Surely they will lead me into salvation.”[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]“I [/i]will [i]protect my pack. No hesitation. No restraint. No exceptions.”[/i]
